title: The Woodpecker.
content:
His bill an auger is,
    His head, a cap and frill.
    He laboreth at every tree, --
    A worm his utmost goal.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "The Woodpecker."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
